title: Create shared extraction packet and handoff to memory and analytics
requirements: Define ExtractionPacket with source identity, fingerprints, normalized text, safe snippets, entities, claims, business facts, DLP findings and provenance.
Generate KnowledgeDelta for memory and AnalyticsFactDelta for metrics from one extraction result.
Make downstream handoff idempotent and replay-safe.
Do not duplicate expensive parser/LLM extraction between memory and analytics.
